chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Hello guys, my name is Nitish and you are welcome to my YouTube channel. So, in this video, I am going to make an announcement. And the announcement is that I am going to start a new playlist on my channel by the name of 100 days of deep learning. So, those who have already come to my channel,

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: they must know that last year I created a course for my channel called 100 days of machine learning. And after that, I got a lot of requests from your side that I should also create a course on deep learning. So, I tried.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Last year, many times I thought that let's create a course on deep learning. But honestly, I was not able to create the course. The reason was that I found it difficult to explain deep learning on camera. Because deep learning is a bit difficult. So, I took some time.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: I taught some people offline. In fact, I tried to teach the kids the core ideas of deep learning. Basic principles. The whole idea was that I should be able to explain deep learning in a very simplified way. That was the idea.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: So, after 6-8 months of effort, I think now I am ready. To be able to explain and teach deep learning properly. Also, my NLP course is almost complete. 2 videos are left, but they also need deep learning. So, I thought that this is the right time to create this course.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: So, what will happen in the course? How will it happen? This video is made for that. If you watch this video till the end, then I will tell you first what curriculum we will follow.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: After that, what are the basic prerequisites? After that, what are the special features of this course? And lastly, I will also provide some extra content in this course. I will also tell you that during this video. So, I will share the screen.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: And we will start our conversation. So guys, let's start our discussion with curriculum. The most important thing is what we are going to study. Deep learning is very vast. And a lot of things come in deep learning.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Because there are different types of neural networks. So, my idea in this course will be that I will cover the whole curriculum. So, I have done a lot of research in the process of making this curriculum. I myself have been working on deep learning for the past 4 years. So, I also had some idea.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: But despite this, I have referred many online courses. Referred a lot of books. And after that, I have made a curriculum. So, I can broadly divide our curriculum into 3-4 categories. The first category would be ANN.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Artificial Neural Network. The simplest type of neural network. First of all, we will work on this. After that, we will shift our focus to CNNs. Convolutional Neural Networks.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Basically, the neural networks that perform the best on image data. We will focus on them. After that, we will move on to RNNs. Which we call Recurrent Neural Networks. And they are used a lot for textual data.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: And after that, we will go towards Generative Models. We will discuss GANs. And we will discuss things like Autoencoders. Okay. And after that, we will come back and discuss a few topics.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Like Object Detection. And let's say like Image Segmentation. So, I have divided this course into 5 parts. At this point, if you ask me. So, the things that we will cover in ANN.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: I have written it very elaborately in a document. I will show you the document. So, this is the document. You can see this whole course is divided into 5 parts. And this is the first part.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Artificial Neural Network. And in this, we will spend a total of around 30-35 days. Out of 100 days. Okay. The idea would be that the most basic neural network.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: Artificial Neural Network. We read it very well. Because if you cover it once. Then you will have less trouble in the future neural networks. There will be trouble, but a little less.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: So, we will start with the absolute basics. You can see what is Deep Learning. What is Deep Learning vs Machine Learning. Why is Deep Learning famous today? What are the applications of Deep Learning?

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: What are its types? History of Deep Learning. So, what will happen with this? You will get a little idea. You will get a little perspective.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: In the world of Deep Learning. Okay. After that, we will start with Perceptron. Okay. So, Perceptron is the building block of neural networks.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: It is said that Perceptron is the absolute unit of neural networks. Pick up any neural network. It is made up of Perceptron. Okay. So, what will we do?

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: We will study Perceptron very well. We will first discuss what is a Perceptron? What is its relationship with Neuron? How is the prediction in it? How is the training in it?

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: And then what is the problem in it? Because of which Multilayer Perceptrons as in Artificial Neural Networks were needed. Okay. So, after that, when we do this once. We will move towards MLP.

chunks.text: Which we call Multilayer Perceptron. Or you can call it ANN. And in this, we will first take intuition. How do MLPs work? We will learn the notation of weights and biases in it.

chunks.text: So, here we will study some algorithms. Like Back Propagation, Gradient Descent. Okay. We will cover this. Once we have developed so much theory.

chunks.text: After that, we will move on to the practical side. Okay. So, first of all, we will see the installation. Because installing the libraries of deep learning. I am talking about TensorFlow Keras.

chunks.text: It is a little difficult. I will explain it in great detail. So that it can run on everyone's machine. After that, we will use the Keras library. We will see two examples.

chunks.text: Because we have studied the basics. So, the first example will be on regression. And the second will be on classification. After that, when we have got some idea of both practical and theory. Now what we will do is.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
chunks.text: We will learn how to improve the performance of your neural network. Okay. So, we will learn a lot of concepts here. We will talk about exploding vanishing gradients. We will talk about dropout layers.

chunks.title: 100 Days of Deep Learning | Course Announcement
